'''鈭歾h-j-g''' ('''kazhajag''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:censure|censure]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-j-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:censure|censure]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歾h-j-g
|-
! Lemma
| kazhajag
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thizhajag|thizhajag]] || [[word:jizhajag|jizhajag]] || [[word:shizhajag|shizhajag]] || [[word:kizhajag|kizhajag]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuzhajag|thuthuzhajag]] || [[word:jujuzhajag|jujuzhajag]] || [[word:shushuzhajag|shushuzhajag]] || [[word:kukuzhajag|kukuzhajag]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuzhajag|thuzhajag]] || [[word:juzhajag|juzhajag]] || [[word:shuzhajag|shuzhajag]] || [[word:kuzhajag|kuzhajag]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuzhajag|thuzhajag]] || [[word:juzhajag|juzhajag]] || [[word:shuzhajag|shuzhajag]] || [[word:kuzhajag|kuzhajag]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thezhajag|thezhajag]] || [[word:jezhajag|jezhajag]] || [[word:shezhajag|shezhajag]] || [[word:kezhajag|kezhajag]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothozhajag|thothozhajag]] || [[word:jojozhajag|jojozhajag]] || [[word:shoshozhajag|shoshozhajag]] || [[word:kokozhajag|kokozhajag]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thozhajag|thozhajag]] || [[word:jozhajag|jozhajag]] || [[word:shozhajag|shozhajag]] || [[word:kozhajag|kozhajag]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thozhajag|thozhajag]] || [[word:jozhajag|jozhajag]] || [[word:shozhajag|shozhajag]] || [[word:kozhajag|kozhajag]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙zhajag|th忙zhajag]] || [[word:j忙zhajag|j忙zhajag]] || [[word:sh忙zhajag|sh忙zhajag]] || [[word:k忙zhajag|k忙zhajag]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathazhajag|thathazhajag]] || [[word:jajazhajag|jajazhajag]] || [[word:shashazhajag|shashazhajag]] || [[word:kakazhajag|kakazhajag]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thazhajag|thazhajag]] || [[word:jazhajag|jazhajag]] || [[word:shazhajag|shazhajag]] || [[word:kazhajag|kazhajag]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thazhajag|thazhajag]] || [[word:jazhajag|jazhajag]] || [[word:shazhajag|shazhajag]] || [[word:kazhajag|kazhajag]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shazhajag|shazhajag]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshazhajag|goshazhajag]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishazhajag|gokishazhajag]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shazhajagn眉|shazhajagn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshazhajagnkn眉|goshazhajagnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishazhajagn眉|gokishazhajagn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shazhajagsh毛|shazhajagsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshazhajagnksh毛|goshazhajagnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishazhajagsh毛|gokishazhajagsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazhajagro|shazhajagro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazhajagnkro|goshazhajagnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazhajagro|gokishazhajagro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shazhajagmu|shazhajagmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazhajagnkmu|goshazhajagnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazhajagmu|gokishazhajagmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shazhajagsher|shazhajagsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshazhajagnksher|goshazhajagnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishazhajagsher|gokishazhajagsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shazhajagng|shazhajagng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshazhajagnkng|goshazhajagnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishazhajagng|gokishazhajagng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shazhajagya|shazhajagya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshazhajagnkya|goshazhajagnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishazhajagya|gokishazhajagya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shazhajagyam|shazhajagyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshazhajagnkyam|goshazhajagnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishazhajagyam|gokishazhajagyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazhajagn眉sh毛|shazhajagn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazhajagnkn眉sh毛|goshazhajagnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazhajagn眉sh毛|gokishazhajagn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazhajagn眉ro|shazhajagn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazhajagnkn眉ro|goshazhajagnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazhajagn眉ro|gokishazhajagn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazhajagn眉mu|shazhajagn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazhajagnkn眉mu|goshazhajagnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazhajagn眉mu|gokishazhajagn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazhajagsh毛n眉|shazhajagsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazhajagnksh毛n眉|goshazhajagnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazhajagsh毛n眉|gokishazhajagsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazhajagsh毛ro|shazhajagsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazhajagnksh毛ro|goshazhajagnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazhajagsh毛ro|gokishazhajagsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazhajagsh毛mu|shazhajagsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazhajagnksh毛mu|goshazhajagnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazhajagsh毛mu|gokishazhajagsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazhajagron眉|shazhajagron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazhajagnkron眉|goshazhajagnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazhajagron眉|gokishazhajagron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazhajagrosh毛|shazhajagrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazhajagnkrosh毛|goshazhajagnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazhajagrosh毛|gokishazhajagrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shazhajagromu|shazhajagromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshazhajagnkromu|goshazhajagnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishazhajagromu|gokishazhajagromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shazhajagmun眉|shazhajagmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshazhajagnkmun眉|goshazhajagnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishazhajagmun眉|gokishazhajagmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shazhajagmush毛|shazhajagmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshazhajagnkmush毛|goshazhajagnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishazhajagmush毛|gokishazhajagmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shazhajagmuro|shazhajagmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshazhajagnkmuro|goshazhajagnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishazhajagmuro|gokishazhajagmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==

[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|654f723}}
